talk_metadata.session_title: Strengthening the Oncology Trial Ecosystem through Operational and Regulatory Innovation
talk_metadata.talk_title: Operational Realities of US Oncology Trial Site Activation
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "US actually is performing quite well compared to other regions, where we're around 150 days"
Speaker said: "the US actually drops precipitously, where it takes over 300 days to reach that milestone"
Speaker said: "time to first patient in, and the US is roughly twice as long there as well"

crispro_opportunity.description: Standardize and centralize site activation workflows to reduce the >300‑day lag in scaling US sites to 75% activation.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "US actually drops precipitously, where it takes over 300 days to reach that milestone"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model site‑level activation bottlenecks and recommend optimal sequencing of regulatory, contracting, and IRB steps to accelerate scaling.

talk_metadata.session_title: Strengthening the Oncology Trial Ecosystem through Operational and Regulatory Innovation
talk_metadata.talk_title: Site Activation Process at Moffitt: Ready‑to‑Wear vs Bespoke
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "We've brought our activation times down at least in half from what they were several years ago"
Speaker said: "There are hundreds of pages just to get oriented around how to serve in that role"
Speaker said: "Central IRBs are very fast, very good in terms of getting things back"

crispro_opportunity.description: Leverage CrisPRO’s computational workflow engine to create a “ready‑to‑wear” activation package that reduces redundant SOPs and contract negotiations across sites.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "There are hundreds of pages just to get oriented around how to serve in that role"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can generate a standardized activation blueprint that auto‑populates site‑specific documents, cutting manual effort.

crispro_opportunity.description: Partner with central IRB providers to integrate CrisPRO’s amendment tracking module, speeding up protocol amendment reviews.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker said: "Central IRBs are very fast, very good in terms of getting things back"
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO’s amendment impact predictor can prioritize changes that require full review versus those that can be fast‑tracked.

unresolved_questions: How can the extensive SOP documentation be streamlined without sacrificing compliance?
What incentives are needed for CROs and sponsors to adopt a unified activation framework?
